name: trt
_comment_c_serving: 50 µs/seq — raw TRT-LLM (no Dynamo orchestrator). The C++ runtime is fast per-kernel but exposes more individual kernel launches per step than Dynamo, and the per-seq host loop runs on the CPU between forward passes without orchestrator absorption. Sits at the bottom of decode.md §7.2's 50-100 µs raw-C++ range; aliased to trt-llm and trtllm in the InferenceX dataset.
_comment_kernel_launch: 1.5 µs — typical CUDA-graph replay launch budget for raw TRT-LLM.
_comment_moe_a2a_pattern: gather — raw TRT-LLM doesn't expose DeepEP-style scatter; defaults to gather-then-dispatch.
